description_long: This house features a rectangular, modern design with a flat roof and a beige exterior. The front facade includes a small porch area with two potted plants, a flower bed, and a main entry door beneath a window with a black awning. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and large panes, and the rear side has a large garage door. The side walls are mostly solid with a single horizontal window on each side, emphasizing privacy. The roof is flat and the house appears to be a single story with a clear, open floor plan visible from above. The landscaping is minimal, with a small patch of grass and decorative elements at the front.
description: A modern, single-story beige house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a small landscaped front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry with a porch, potted plants, flower bed, and a window with a black awning.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a mostly solid beige wall with a single horizontal window and minimal exterior features.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a large garage door and a small window above, with no landscaping.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a single horizontal window and plain beige wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, two potted plants, flower bed, and a black awning above the window.
